subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest me seated upon the solid rock within the fortress of 'Akká, detached from all who dwell on earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی ترانی جالسا علی الصخره الصماء فی حصن العکا منقطعا عمن فی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @theodicy; the mystery of evil; of suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause
